title: AStages
description: Restrict nearly every aspect of gameplay based on progression.
body:
# AStages mod is OUT!

AStages is a progression framework for Minecraft that gives you full control over how players interact with the world.

## Doc & Community
If you want to explore all features or build advanced systems, the official documentation and community resources are available here:

- **Wiki**: [here](https://github.com/Alessandro-Casale/AStages/wiki)!
- **Discord**: [here](https://discord.gg/rG94UGFAXS)!

## Stage System
AStages supports multiple types of stages, so progression can be as simple or as dynamic as you want:

- Player Stages – classic per-player progression
- Server Stages – global stages shared by everyone and "stored" in server
- Temporary Stages – stages that automatically expire after a set amount of time

## World & Gameplay Control
AStages is fully integrated with **KubeJS** and allows you to restrict or modify nearly **Every Aspect** of gameplay, including:

- Access to dimensions and structures
- Block and ore visibility or replacement
- Item usage, naming, and effects
- Loot tables and mob spawning
- Enchantments, potion effects, and vanilla recipes
- Block and block entity GUIs
- Crop growth stages and animal interactions
- World regions, blocking interactions and explosions

## Integration & Addons
AStages is available on **Modrinth** and **CurseForge** for:

- **Forge 1.20.1**
- **NeoForge 1.21.1**

First-party addons are available right now and totally integrated with AStages:

- **[AStages Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astages-curios)**
- **[AStages Pufferfish's Skills](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astages-pufferfishs-skills)**
